items.title: Ex-Nigerian oil minister denies taking bribes
items.dek: Diezani Alison-Madueke is accused of living “a life of luxury” in the UK at properties paid for and refurbished by industry figures.
items.body: Diezani Alison-Madueke is accused of living “a life of luxury” in the UK at properties paid for and refurbished by industry figures.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: The US blockade of Iran is a gamble. Will it work?
items.dek: The US military has the capability to mount a blockade of vessels moving in and out of the Gulf. The question is: to what end?
items.body: The US military has the capability to mount a blockade of vessels moving in and out of the Gulf. The question is: to what end?
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Peru election drags into second day after ballot delivery fiasco
items.dek: Technical and logistical problems mean Peruvians choosing a new president and members of Congress continue to vote on Monday.
items.body: Technical and logistical problems mean Peruvians choosing a new president and members of Congress continue to vote on Monday.
items.author: IriLine Desk
